title: CatalogQueryResult
description: Results from querying the Context7 catalog for MCP tools and agent skills matching required capabilities

matched_tools.description: MCP tool servers found in catalog/tools/ that match required capabilities

name.description: Tool server name from the catalog

relevance.description: How well this tool matches the required capability

reasoning.description: Why this tool was matched and at this relevance level

matched_skills.description: Agent skills found in rex/_default/ that match required capabilities

path.description: Path relative to cto-agents repo root

relevance.description: How well this skill matches the required capability

reasoning.description: Why this skill was matched and at this relevance level

unresolved_capabilities.description: Capabilities that could not be matched to any existing tool or skill

capability.description: The required capability that was not matched

search_attempted.description: Whether a Context7 search was performed

suggestion.description: Recommended next step to resolve this gap
